#3029: Add support to structured output to Vertex AI gemini (#3030)

## Issue
Closes [#3029](https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j/issues/3029)  

## Change
This PR addresses the issue of unsupported JSON response format when
using the `ChatRequest` in the `VertexAiGeminiChatModel`.
- Added support for defining the `responseMimeType` and `responseSchema`
in the `generationConfig` of the API request.
- Implemented changes in `VertexAiGeminiChatModel` to set the
`responseMimeType` to `application/json` and allow the `responseSchema`
to be configured dynamically.
- Added integration tests in `VertexAiGeminiChatModelIT` to validate the
expected behavior when setting the response format to JSON.

Update Metadata Documentation to Include UUID Support (#3162)

### Summary

This PR updates the documentation for the `Metadata` key-value map to
include `UUID` as one of the supported value types.

### Details

The current documentation lists the supported value types as:
- String
- Integer
- Long
- Float
- Double

However, `UUID` is already supported in the implementation but missing
from the docs.

This update adds `UUID` to the list of supported types in the
documentation to improve clarity and accuracy.

This PR does not change any code logic, only updates the documentation.

Co-authored-by: Harikrishna <harikrishna.gurram@walmart.com>

## Issue
<!-- Please specify the ID of the issue this PR is addressing. For
example: "Closes #1234" or "Fixes #1234" -->
At the moment it is not possible to use an AI service as tool for
another AI service because the proxy method doesn't carry the annotation
of the interface method.

## Change
<!-- Please describe the changes you made. -->
Improve discovery of the `@Tool` annotation also looking for it on the
interfaces implemented by the proxy class.

  • Fix NPE in MetricsChatModelListener.java by @​vincz777 in quarkiverse/quarkus-langchain4j#1529
  • Bump com.google.auth:google-auth-library-oauth2-http from 1.35.0 to 1.36.0 by @​dependabot in quarkiverse/quarkus-langchain4j#1532
